zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Molyneux於1424年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，她的父親Richard Molyneux28歲，母親Joan Haydock38歲。她於1443年與Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1518年在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Molyneux于1424年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，她的父亲Richard Molyneux28岁，母亲Joan Haydock38岁。她于1443年与Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1518年在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Molyneux was born in 1424, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Molyneux, was 28 and her mother, Joan Haydock, was 38. She married Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury in 1443. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. She died in 1518, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Molyneux est née en 1424, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Haydock, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury en 1443. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1518, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Molyneux 1424 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Molyneux 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Haydock 38. Sie hat 1443 Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1518 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury nel 1443. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1518, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Molyneuxが1424年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは28歳，母Joan Haydockは38歳であった。1443年にSir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1518年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで94歳で死去した。

ko.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일 스트 리나르드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Molyneux(이)가 1424년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Haydock(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1443년 Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Molyneux nasceu em 1424, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haydock, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury em 1443. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1518, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: ст леонард'с чурч, валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Molyneux родилась в 1424 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Haydock, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury в 1443 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1518 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

Se casó con Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury en 1443. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió en 1518, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años.
